top_signals.title: Gold Slips for Second Day as Hormuz Attacks Fan Inflation Fears
top_signals.summary: Gold fell for a second day after renewed attacks on shipping in the Strait of Hormuz, a reminder of the risks faced by vessels carrying oil and natural gas via the waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Italy’s Oldest Dairy Taps New Way to Borrow Against Aging Cheese
top_signals.summary: Italy’s oldest dairy company has borrowed money against cheese still aging in its warehouse, taking advantage of a change in the law aimed at helping food and wine producers access finance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: A China shock is shaking Silicon Valley
top_signals.summary: One thing has become clear: Open models from China now pose one of the biggest existential threats to the U.S. AI establishment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hedge Fund Veterans Are Accelerating a Major Shift in Development Finance
top_signals.summary: A group of hedge fund veterans is helping drive a fundamental shift in how to generate financing for developing nations.

top_signals.title: Alpaca Completes EEA Passporting to 29 Countries, Expanding Access to Regulated Investment Services Across Europe
top_signals.summary: Alpaca now provides regulated, localized investment services across the European Economic Area
